wine_restaurants.name: Le Pressoir d'Argent - Gordon Ramsay
wine_restaurants.address: InterContinental Bordeaux - Le Grand Hotel, 2-5 place de la Comedie, 33000 Bordeaux, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Contemporary French; seafood and Girondine specialties; wine-pairing menus
wine_restaurants.description: Gordon Ramsay's Bordeaux flagship in the Grand Hotel, with a 1,500-bottle cellar and sommelier team offering full appellation flights. Tasting menus engineered around Medoc and Right Bank classics.

wine_restaurants.name: Le Chapon Fin
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Classical French brasserie; Bordeaux wine-pairing menus; foie gras and duck confits
wine_restaurants.description: Bordeaux's most storied restaurant, founded 1825 with its original Belle Epoque grotto dining room intact. 600-label cellar and an expert sommelier team across all Bordeaux appellations.

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurant Gabriel
wine_restaurants.address: 10 place de la Bourse, 33000 Bordeaux, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern French; market-driven Girondine; seasonal Bordeaux pairing menus
wine_restaurants.description: Michelin-starred restaurant inside the 18th-century Palais de la Bourse overlooking the Garonne. Chef Nicolas Frion's wine-pairing menus built around Pessac-Leognan and Right Bank classics.

wine_restaurants.name: La Grande Maison de Bernard Magrez
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Haute cuisine; Joeel Robuchon-influenced menus; comprehensive Bordeaux and Magrez estate cellar
wine_restaurants.description: Chef Jooel Robuchon's legacy property owned by Bernard Magrez, with a 3,000-bottle cellar anchored by Magrez estate wines and a comprehensive Bordeaux first-growth vertical collection.

wine_restaurants.name: Les Belles Perdrix de Troplong Mondot
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern French; Girondine market dishes; estate wine-pairing menus
wine_restaurants.description: Michelin-starred restaurant in The Keys hotel at Chateau Troplong Mondot, with a 2,000-bottle cellar showcasing Troplong Mondot across five vintages plus premium Right Bank peers.

wine_restaurants.name: Hostellerie de Plaisance
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Gascon-inspired haute cuisine; foie gras and truffle; Saint-Emilion vertical flight menus
wine_restaurants.description: Michelin-starred hotel restaurant on the bell-tower square in Saint-Emilion village. Extensive Premier Grand Cru Classe cellar; wine-director-led pairing menus across Right Bank appellations.

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurant Cordeillan-Bages
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern French Landaise; market-driven seasonal menus; Medoc wine-pairing programmes
wine_restaurants.description: Michelin-starred dining at the Chateau Cordeillan-Bages Relais and Chateaux hotel in the heart of Pauillac. 1,200-label cellar covering all Medoc communes; Lynch-Bages and neighbouring estates feature prominently.

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurant Lalique at Lafaurie-Peyraguey
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Contemporary French; Sauternes-pairing menus; dessert courses with d'Yquem and Lafaurie verticals
wine_restaurants.description: Two-Michelin-starred restaurant within the Lalique luxury hotel at Chateau Lafaurie-Peyraguey, the world's premier dining experience dedicated to Sauternes wines including a 350,000-bottle estate cellar.
